public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as internal skeptic.
manner: Treats loose talk like evidence waiting to harden into record and listens for contradiction before charm. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a internal skeptic still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of internal skeptic in and around Loss Ledger Circles, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Loss Ledger Circles workable through the obligations of internal skeptic while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep records, witness, or account integrity credible while people try to hurry, blur, or weaponize the paper trail. Around Loss Ledger Circles, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of internal skeptic visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vassa Snowveil can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Vassa Snowveil needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Loss Ledger Circles.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Vassa Snowveil communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Loss Ledger Circles: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
